modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Camera controls are switching between Main and Aux cameras.

full_description_text: I was using the touch panel on the podium, and it was really confusing. When I tried to control the Main Camera, it actually moved the Aux Camera instead, and the other way around too. I thought maybe it was just me, but it keeps happening, and it makes it hard to present properly.
short_description: Camera controls are switching between Main and Aux cameras.
description: I was using the touch panel on the podium, and it was really confusing. When I tried to control the Main Camera, it actually moved the Aux Camera instead, and the other way around too. I thought maybe it was just me, but it keeps happening, and it makes it hard to present properly.
